faults.Title: FLT-MQOU7M03
faults.Description:
The roof top air cooled condenser heat exchange fins have corroded since the installation in
2017, therefore the lower section of fins was physically removed to regain air flow and
performance from the condenser.
Although there are no operational issues until the ambient temperature reaches 29oC, then
compressor trips occur.

As per Johns end of contract report
faults.ActionTaken: quote to be sent to border

faults.Title: FLT-MQOUDPEM
faults.Description:
D2 & D4 Compressor Overhaul
over due refurbish of compressor

faults.Title: FLT-MQOZLGBG
faults.Description: Water from unit inside cold store
faults.ActionTaken: Works being carried out scissor lift needed

faults.Title: CO-1001
faults.Description: Chamber C system 3 seems to be not refrigerating correctly even after heatwave. On my way on Sunday 28th of June 16:46

faults.Title: FLT-1002
faults.Description:
Following Call out 1001 repair/works
scissor Lift needed to access areas to complete repairs
faults.ActionTaken: once approved and scissor lift is onsite works can be completed
